utterances.speaker: Mark
utterances.text: Why do all you are coffee mugs have numbers on the bottom ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_all you are coffee mugs have numbers on the bottom

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh . That is so Monica can keep track . That way if one on them is missing , she can be like , Where is number 27 ? !

emotion_cause.span: 2_if one on them is missing , she can be like , Where is number 27 ? !
